text:
or not selecting
the proper ascendant. Then all the Sages and Saints assembled
and discussed about the proper ascendant is and could not come
to the conclusion. Finally the decision is that "The best
auspicious & proper ascendant is the time when one
recalls the name of the god or Paramaatma". Ever now,
prior to, if any auspicious functions are to be performed, the ftrst
thing is said, this ascedant (thadeva Iagnam), strenth ofstaFS
(taraabalam), strength ofMoon (Chandrabalam) ... and
remembering the name of God Pundareekaaksha and the
function is started. so, it is said that the time when one
remembers the name of the God is the best ascendant. To say
that so & so ascendant is auspicious is nothing but a blind belief
or superstitious.

1 04 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI AS1ROLOGY

R.GRAO
